diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -3,11 +3,13 @@
 import torch.nn.functional as F

 

 class TrafficPredictor(nn.Module):

-    def __init__(self, in_channels=12, hidden_channels=64, out_channels=12):

+    def __init__(self, in_channels=12, hidden_channels=256, out_channels=12, dropout=0.1):

         super().__init__()

         self.lin1 = nn.Linear(in_channels, hidden_channels)

         self.lin2 = nn.Linear(hidden_channels, hidden_channels)

-        self.lin3 = nn.Linear(hidden_channels, out_channels)

+        self.lin3 = nn.Linear(hidden_channels, hidden_channels)

+        self.lin4 = nn.Linear(hidden_channels, out_channels)

+        self.dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)

 

     def forward(self, x, adj_norm):

         # x: [B, N, in_channels], adj_norm: [N, N] or [B, N, N]

@@ -20,8 +22,13 @@
         if adj_norm.dtype != x.dtype:

             adj_norm = adj_norm.to(x.dtype)

         x = F.relu(self.lin1(x))

+        x = self.dropout(x)

         x = torch.bmm(adj_norm, x)

         x = F.relu(self.lin2(x))

+        x = self.dropout(x)

         x = torch.bmm(adj_norm, x)

-        x = self.lin3(x)

+        x = F.relu(self.lin3(x))

+        x = self.dropout(x)

+        x = torch.bmm(adj_norm, x)

+        x = self.lin4(x)

         return x

--- a/train.py
+++ b/train.py

 from model import TrafficPredictor

     adj_norm = normalize_adj(adj_path)

@@ -60,8 +61,9 @@

     adj_norm = adj_norm.to(device)

     optimizer = Adam(model.parameters(), lr=0.001)

+    scheduler = ReduceLROnPlateau(optimizer, mode='min', factor=0.5, patience=5, verbose=False, min_lr=1e-6)

     criterion = torch.nn.L1Loss()

-    num_epochs = 5

+    num_epochs = 20

     best_val_loss = float('inf')

     mean_t = torch.tensor(mean, dtype=torch.float32, device=device)

     std_t = torch.tensor(std, dtype=torch.float32, device=device)

@@ -92,6 +94,7 @@
                 loss = criterion(output_denorm, y)

                 val_loss += loss.item()

         val_loss /= len(val_loader)

+        scheduler.step(val_loss)

         print(f"Epoch {epoch+1}/{num_epochs}, Train Loss: {train_loss:.4f}, Val MAE: {val_loss:.4f}")

         metrics = {

             "epoch": int(epoch),
